description_long: This is a classic bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock and a blued steel barrel, reminiscent of early to mid-20th century military firearms such as the Mauser or Springfield. The stock is made from polished wood, extending from the butt to the fore-end, providing a sturdy and ergonomic grip. The barrel is long and slender, constructed from dark metal, and features iron sights for aiming. A fixed internal magazine is visible, with a clip of ammunition positioned above the receiver, suggesting a top-loading mechanism. The trigger guard and bolt handle are also made of metal, with the bolt handle protruding on the right side. The overall design is utilitarian, robust, and built for reliability in various environments.
description: A classic bolt-action rifle with a polished wooden stock, long blued steel barrel, and iron sights, featuring a top-loading internal magazine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, wooden stock, metal barrel, and a clip of ammunition above the receiver.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the slim profile of the barrel and stock, with the bolt and clip visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, metal barrel, and the clip of ammunition from the left side.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the underside of the rifle, showing the trigger guard and the magazine area.
